prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.7 kg; Height 152.2 cm; BMI 33.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.7%; 9 months ago 6.4%; 6 months ago 6.3%; 3 months ago 6.1%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 131mg/dL; 9 months ago 151mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 150mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.9kg; 9 months ago 80.3kg; 6 months ago 77.7kg; 3 months ago 75.8kg; current 76.7kg), Height (12 months ago 152.2cm; 9 months ago 152.2cm; 6 months ago 152.2cm; 3 months ago 152.2cm; current 152.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 138mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 30U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; current 51mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 259mg/g; 9 months ago 258mg/g; 6 months ago 165mg/g; 3 months ago 215mg/g; current 206mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 110mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 103mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.01 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
